zh.lifeSummary: 當Rasse VIII van Gavere於大約1259年出生在比利時海瑙特艾福雷斯時，他的父親Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke42歲，母親Jeanne de Wavrin44歲。他於1273年2月之前與Beatrix De Longueval結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1307年11月23日在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rasse VIII van Gavere于大约1259年出生在比利时海瑙特艾福雷斯时，他的父亲Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke42岁，母亲Jeanne de Wavrin44岁。他于1273年2月之前与Beatrix De Longueval结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1307年11月23日在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gavere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Francois, Michel.
Altered form of French   Lariviere  .

variants.name: Lariviere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Normand, Fernand, Marcel, Adelard, Andre, Gaston, Philibert, Aime, Alcide, Alphonse, Antoine.
French (Larivière):
habitational name from any of numerous places in various parts of France named Larivière or La Rivière, from Old French riviere ‘river, shore’.

nameMeanings.name: Rasse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: unexplained.
English: variant of   Pass  .
French: nickname from Old French passe ‘sparrow’. This surname is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Pass
meanings: English: from a pet form of the medieval personal name Passe, probably a pet form of Pascal .
German: topographic name from Pass ‘pass, passage’ (from Middle Low German pas ‘pace, passage way, water gauge’).
Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name or nickname from Yiddish and Polish pas ‘belt, girdle’.

nameMeanings.name: VIII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine pet form of   Vivien   and   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Rasse VIII van Gavere was born about 1259, in Chièvres, Hainaut, Belgium, his father, Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke, was 42 and his mother, Jeanne de Wavrin, was 44. He married Beatrix De Longueval before February 1273. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 November 1307, in Gavere, East Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rasse VIII van Gavere est né environ 1259, à Chièvres, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Wavrin, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix De Longueval avant février 1273. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 novembre 1307, à Gavere, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rasse VIII van Gavere um 1259 in Chièvres, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke 42 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Wavrin 44. Er hat vor Februar 1273 Beatrix De Longueval geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. November 1307 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Gavere, Ostflandern, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rasse VIII van Gavere è nato il circa 1259 nel Chièvres, Hainaut, Belgio, il suo padre, Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Wavrin, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix De Longueval prima del febbraio 1273. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 novembre 1307, nel Gavere, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rasse VIII van Gavereが約1259年にベルギーヘイナトチevレスで生まれた時，父Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerkeは42歳，母Jeanne de Wavrinは44歳であった。1273年2月以前にBeatrix De Longuevalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1307年11月23日にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンガバーで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rasse VIII van Gavere(이)가 대략 1259년 벨기에 하인오트 치e브레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Wavrin(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1273년 2월 이전 Beatrix De Longueval(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1307년 11월 23일 벨기에 스트-블라아더 게이버에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rasse VIII van Gavere nasceu aproximadamente 1259, em Chièvres, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Wavrin, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix De Longueval antes fevereiro de 1273. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1307, em Gavere, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rasse VIII van Gavere родился около 1259 г. в местности чиeвресь, ханаут, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Wavrin, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix De Longueval перед февраль 1273 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 ноября 1307 г. в местности гавир, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rasse VIII van Gavere nació aproximadamente 1259, en Chièvres, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Wavrin, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Beatrix De Longueval antes de febrero de 1273. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1307, en Gavere, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, a la edad de 49 años.
